title: Reading Full Books in Secondary English Language Arts Classrooms: Findings from the Spring 2025 American Instructional Resources Survey
summary_en: Amid concerns about the diminishing role of full books in schools, this report examines whether secondary English language arts teachers assign full books and how full-book assignment varies based on teachersā€™ curricula and context.

title: School-Level Poverty in Education Survey Research: Can Free or Reduced-Price Lunch Be Substituted as a Weighting Variable by Other, More Reliable Measures?
summary_en: The purpose of this exploratory study was to examine the potential utility of school-level poverty measures other than free or reduced-price lunch for achieving population representativeness in survey weighting.
